rationale: Educ. Code §12.151 merely defines 'public junior college' and 'public senior college or university' for its subchapter. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: "public junior college" and "public senior college or university" have the meanings assigned by Section 61.003.
_note: No conflict; rule text is definitional and unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
